        VERSION 1.0
        LANGUAGES CXX
        )

    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/rotate_vector.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/rotate_vector.inl"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/scalar_multiplication.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/scalar_relational.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/scalar_relational.inl"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/spline.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/spline.inl"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/std_based_type.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/std_based_type.inl"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/string_cast.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/string_cast.inl"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/texture.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/texture.inl"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/transform.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/transform.inl"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/transform2.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/transform2.inl"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/type_aligned.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/type_aligned.inl"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/type_trait.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/type_trait.inl"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/vec_swizzle.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/vector_angle.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/vector_angle.inl"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/vector_query.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/vector_query.inl"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/wrap.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/gtx/wrap.inl"
    # simd
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/simd/common.h"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/simd/exponential.h"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/simd/geometric.h"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/simd/integer.h"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/simd/matrix.h"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/simd/neon.h"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/simd/packing.h"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/simd/platform.h"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/simd/trigonometric.h"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/simd/vector_relational.h"
)

set( SOURCES
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/detail/glm.cpp"
)

add_library("${PROJECT_NAME}" STATIC "${SOURCES}")

target_compile_features("${PROJECT_NAME}" PUBLIC cxx_std_20)

target_include_directories("${PROJECT_NAME}"
    PUBLIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/..
)
